tools.name: get_jet_estimate
tools.description: Get an indicative private jet charter price estimate for a route, broken down by aircraft category (light / midsize / heavy jet). Returns an instant price range. IMPORTANT: an estimate is an indicative range, not a confirmed price. After presenting the estimate to the user, ALWAYS offer them the nex

tools.name: request_jet_confirmation
tools.description: Submit a request for CONFIRMED live private jet pricing. Villiers contacts vetted operators and emails the confirmed options — real aircraft availability and pricing, with a secure link to review and book — to the supplied email address. This endpoint requires a prior get_jet_estimate call in the sa

tools.name: get_confirmation_status
tools.description: Check the outcome of a previous request_jet_confirmation call — has Villiers sent confirmed options yet, and where does the trip stand now (still being sourced / options sent / booked / closed with no booking). Requires an affiliate token (Bearer header) and only returns trips that were created unde

tools.name: search_empty_legs
tools.description: Search Villiers' available empty-leg flights — heavily discounted, one-off private jet repositioning flights that are significantly cheaper than a full charter. Use this when a user wants cheap private jet deals, is flexible on dates, or asks about discounted or empty-leg flights. Optionally filter

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "get_jet_estimate" stacks urgency/override words (important, always). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Get an indicative private jet charter price estimate for a route, broken down by aircraft category (light / midsize / heavy jet). Returns an instant price range…

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_confirmation_status" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Check the outcome of a previous request_jet_confirmation call — has Villiers sent confirmed options yet, and where does the trip stand now (still being sourced …

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_jet_estimate · Private data: get_jet_estimate, request_jet_confirmation, get_confirmation_status, search_empty_legs · Public sink: get_jet_estimate, request_jet_confirmation, get_confirmation_status.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_jet_estimate · Private data: get_jet_estimate, request_jet_confirmation, get_confirmation_status, search_empty_legs · Public sink: get_jet_estimate, request_jet_confirmation, get_confirmation_status

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
